name: Easy Peachy Beef Toss
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 cup Cooked roast beef/steak (cut into strips)
14 oz Canned sliced peaches, in juice
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large salad bowl, combine the cooked beef, romaine, avocado, and drained peaches (set aside the peach juice).
2. Combine the dressing, 1/4 cup of peach juice, and BBQ sauce in a separate small bowl.
3. Just before serving, pour the dressing mixture over the salad and toss lightly.
4. Garnish with halved cherry tomatoes and freshly ground pepper.
